prompt: Start a new Godot game in C#. Set up a fresh project StarForge and prove it builds and runs (something prints).

assertions.text: project.godot declares the C# feature in config/features
A .csproj exists using Godot.NET.Sdk and net8.0
A nuget.config exists pointing at a bundled GodotSharp/Tools/nupkgs feed (offline-safe)
run/main_scene is set inside the [application] section (not [dotnet])
RESULT.md reports dotnet build succeeded and a headless run printed a line to stdout
